FeatureName: Selection policy and configurable GPT prompt
Description: Define the configurable selection policy, optional user preference prompt, and structured GPT response schema used to rank photos for final album selection.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create selection settings for max photos per day, max photos total, OpenAI model settings, deterministic tie-breaks, and large-cluster dedup rules.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a typed selection settings surface for Epic 3 behavior and limits.

Stories.StoryDescription: Make the GPT ranking prompt configurable so the user can optionally specify priorities such as ignoring food, preferring group photos, or supplying a custom topic order.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The ranking flow supports an optional user-configurable preference prompt and a sensible default prompt when no preferences are supplied.

Stories.StoryDescription: Define the structured per-photo response schema containing stable photo ID, rank, scores, theme tags, rationale, and an explicit good-enough selection signal.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a stable structured response contract for GPT day ranking outputs.

Stories.StoryDescription: Define local normalization rules so saved GPT scores from different days can be compared later without resending images.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Saved day-level GPT outputs can be reused for trip-wide selection and quota decisions.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add mocked tests for settings loading, optional prompt overrides, structured response parsing, and score normalization.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests verify prompt configuration, response parsing, and local score normalization.
